# @humanlabs-kr/quest-offerwall-expo

Expo / React Native SDK that embeds The Quest offerwall in a full-screen
react-native-webview with a native header. Pure JS/TS wrapper — no custom native
module.

## Install
npx expo install @humanlabs-kr/quest-offerwall-expo react-native-webview expo-constants expo-linking expo-localization

## Configure (build-time)
Set `extra.theQuest` in app.json / app.config:
  { "expo": { "extra": { "theQuest": { "appId": "<10-char App ID>", "environment": "production" } } } }
`environment` is "production" (default, https://quest.humanlabs.world) or
"staging" (https://quest.seriesc.dev). App ID is NOT secret.
Optional config plugin: plugins: [["@humanlabs-kr/quest-offerwall-expo", { "appId": "...", "environment": "production" }]]

## Usage
1. Mount once at app root:
   import { TheQuestProvider } from "@humanlabs-kr/quest-offerwall-expo";
   <TheQuestProvider>{app}</TheQuestProvider>
2. Show the offerwall from anywhere:
   import { TheQuest } from "@humanlabs-kr/quest-offerwall-expo";
   await TheQuest.show({ userId });                 // standard (unsigned) mode
   await TheQuest.show({ userId, launchProvider }); // secure mode
   show() resolves when the offerwall is closed and calls options.onClose.

## Public API
- TheQuestProvider(props: { children }): required host for the imperative modal.
- TheQuest.show(options): Promise<void>
    options: { userId: string; launchProvider?: (userId) => Promise<LaunchToken>;
               onClose?: () => void; locale?: string }
- LaunchToken: { ts: string | number; nonce: string; sig: string; locale?: string }
- SDK_VERSION: string

## Secure mode (opt-in, App IDs flagged require_signed_launch)
The app secret must NEVER be embedded in the app. `launchProvider` calls YOUR
backend, which signs HMAC-SHA256(app_secret, [app_id,user_id,ts,nonce,locale].join("."))
and returns { ts, nonce, sig, locale? }. Called on every show() (launches expire ±5 min).

## Launch URL
{base}/?app_id=..&user_id=..[&ts=&nonce=&sig=]&locale=..

## Native <-> web bridge (docs/BRIDGE.md)
Injected window.TheQuestNative: openUrl(url) (external only, via Linking),
close(), ready(). platform="expo". UA appends "TheQuestSDK/<version> (expo)".
